title: Decompose Report
description: Structured output schema for the decompose-bead subagent. Reports the result of decomposing a shaped bead into an epic with child beads.

parentBeadId.title: Parent Bead ID
parentBeadId.description: The bead that was promoted to epic (or was already an epic).

childBeadIds.title: Child Bead IDs
childBeadIds.description: Array of newly-created child/leaf bead identifiers.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: One-paragraph description of the decomposition structure and rationale.
